titleZh: 桂馨源公司诉全威公司等土地使用权转让合同纠纷案
titleEn: Gazette Case: Guixinyuan Co. v. Quanwei Co. and Others
forumZh: 最高人民法院公报 / 最高人民法院二审判决
forumEn: Supreme People's Court Gazette / Supreme People's Court second-instance judgment
citation: （2004）民一终字第46号；载《最高人民法院公报》2005年第7期
decisionType: 超越经营范围与土地使用权转让合同效力
holdingZh: 公司营业期限届满但未被注销、吊销的，并不当然丧失法人资格。公司订立的合同虽超出其登记经营范围，但如果实质上系对自身财产的处分，且不违反法律、行政法规的效力性强制规定，不得仅以超越经营范围为由否认合同效力。
holdingEn: A company does not automatically lose its legal-person status merely because its registered business term has expired, so long as it has not been deregistered or revoked. Even if a contract falls outside the company's registered business scope, it should not be denied effect solely on that basis where it is, in substance, a disposition of the company's own property and does not violate mandatory rules on validity in laws or administrative regulations.

sources.label: Official court release
sources.noteZh: 最高人民法院公报案例。公开摘要明确载有“合同亦不属其营业执照所确定的营业范围之内……故本案合同为有效合同”的裁判要点。
sources.noteEn: Supreme People's Court Gazette case whose public summary expressly states that the contract was outside the business scope shown on the business license yet remained effective.
